title: Proxy Manager
subtitle: Configure proxy settings for system and applications
proxy_host_hint: Hostname or IP address (e.g., proxy.example.com or 192.168.1.100)
proxy_port_hint: Port number (e.g., 3128 for HTTP, 1080 for SOCKS5)
proxy_username_hint: Leave empty if no authentication required
proxy_password_hint: Password is stored encrypted in config file (root access only)
bypass_list_hint: Comma-separated hosts/subnets that bypass proxy. Default: local networks
check_urls_hint: Endpoints returning HTTP 204. At least one must succeed for proxy to be considered working.
monitor_hint: If check fails, proxy is auto-disabled for affected targets and services are restarted.
target_packagekit_hint: Built-in Cockpit module for software updates. Requires PackageKit service.
target_system_hint: Applies to all applications that respect environment variables.
hint_refresh: 💡 After applying, refresh package lists in Software Updates / cockpit-apt.
